comment: Curated URLs for the real-URL integration suite. Refresh quarterly (URLs expire when roles close). Keep ~30 URLs spread across Greenhouse/Ashby/Lever + known failure patterns + known successes. When adding, pair 'expected' with the most likely outcome so a regression is obvious.

urls.notes: PLACEHOLDER — replace with a real Perplexity Ashby URL. Perplexity had 1 of 2 Ashby successes in 30d.
